title: geum × intermedium var. willdenowii
intro: Geum × intermedium var. willdenowii, also known as Willdenow's avens or Willdenow's geum, is a hybrid plant species in the rose family (Rosaceae) that is native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues such as wounds, digestive problems, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Geum × intermedium var. willdenowii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
